provenance: hand-labeled by JT for issue #7's eval suite

golden_review.summary: Provisions the benchmark infrastructure (Terraform for the three vector DBs, shell scripts, Makefile targets, CI workflow). IAM scope is broader than the workload requires; the open CIDR on the load generator is a blast-radius concern; cost-impact disclosure is missing from the Makefile target descriptions.

findings.message: IAM role granted on the load-generator host is *:* — drop to least-privilege for just the EC2 + S3 operations the benchmark actually needs.
Security group ingress rule on 0.0.0.0/0 for the load-generator port. Restrict to the VPC CIDR or the operator's office IP.
Makefile `make bench-all` doesn't print the estimated cost before launching. Operators new to the harness may not realize a full run is ~$15 in EC2 + traffic.
